_comment: PROVISIONAL ensemble config. Member set + thresholds were selected on the ~206-word careful sessions and are OVERFIT (held-out CV: i3rab ~92, tashkeel ~86, consonant ~88, FP ~2.5%). DO NOT use as-is in production — finalize after validation on a larger/general dataset, then copy this file to ensemble_config.json to activate. Requires the member model dirs present under models/. IqraEval (phoneme-CTC) is NOT a RecitationEngine and would need a separate adapter; XLS-R members only here.
